nasb.text: When they were near Jebus, the day was almost gone; and the servant said to his master, “Please come, and let us turn aside into this city of the Jebusites and spend the night in it.”

esv.text: When they were near Jebus, the day was nearly over, and the servant said to his master, “Come now, let us turn aside to this city of the Jebusites and spend the night in it.”

cnv.text: 他們走近耶布斯的時候，日頭快要落了；僕人對主人說：“來，讓我們轉到這耶布斯人的城去，好在那裡住宿。”

ccb.text: 他们临近耶布斯时，天快黑了，仆人对主人说：“我们不如就在耶布斯人的城里住宿吧。”
